title: phillyrea subangustifolia subsp. stricta
intro: Phillyrea subangustifolia subsp. stricta, also known as a narrow-leaved phillyrea, is a shrub or small tree native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Oleaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phillyrea subangustifolia subsp. stricta include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
